text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I go into town and spot Gold City
standing in front of a shoe store.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I think you looked more delicate and cute
in the other pumps.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Eep! Delicate? I see, that's a new one for me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
As you can tell, I'm tagging along with these two
while they shop. Like a chaperone, kinda.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yukino and I wanted to get some stuff, and we
thought we'd ask City for advice! ♪

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Um, City! Which d'you suppose I get, pumps or
loafers?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I think the loafers will be more versatile
with your wardrobe.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But if you want to try something new, footwear is
the place to start. So, in that case, I'd recommend
the pumps.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oh! Th-then I'll buy the pumps!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Cool, you've got this.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yukino, I'm glad you found something nice! ♪
Now, it's my turn.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, you want to join us? I need to hear
all types of opinions! ☆ Pleeeease! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling the pressure from Curren Chan's request, I
decide to join the three of them shopping.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So, I'm curious about this line's toner, but what's
like the opinion on it in the industry?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Geez Louise, I don't have the darndest clue what
you're talkin' 'bout, Curren...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You really are quick to pick up on trends. Yeah,
there's been a lot of buzz about it, but...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
From what my makeup artist said, it'd be better
to wait and see. The all-natural line over there
will give you similar effects for a cheaper price.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I see. Okay, I'll do that! I'm glad I could
talk to a pro! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh. So, now that you've both bought
something, are we good for today?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! I wanna see what you're gonna buy too!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I wanna too! You always give me advice,
but...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I nev'r get t'see an actual example of a city girl
shopp'n!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Umm... It's not like I do anything special. Besides,
I don't particularly want or need anything right
now.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: At least tell us what's on your radar lately.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh hey, I bet you know what's on City's wishlist.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you asking my trainer for?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since I see her quite often, I do have some idea
as to what might pique her interest...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wha... How do you know that?
choice_data_list:
I've seen you looking at shoes quite a lot
recently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She kept looking at her feet during practice
yesterday, and just now at the store with Yukino
Bijin, she kept glancing at shoes on display.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Holy macaroni! You're so attentive. I didn't notice
at all!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I knew I could ask you. Well then, let's go check
out some shoes for training! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, you wouldn't happen to know what shoes
she'd want to buy, would you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not fully confident, but I find a pair I think she
might like.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: No way... Does that mean it was on the money?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, get outta here! You're super observant... Or
could there be something more to it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You need to stop it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She glares at me with daggers in her eyes...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Why?
choice_data_list: This is your usual snack time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To avoid getting overly hungry, she always snacks
on a little something every couple of hours.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Holy smokes... That's just like a model! Oh—but you are a model!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The real deal. ♪ Anyway, I could go for
something sweet too. How about crepes?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Just a drink, City?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm watching my calorie intake... even though a
crepe does sound good right now.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Wow! You're such a model!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City appears a bit conflicted, probably
because she actually wants to have a crepe too.
In that case...
choice_data_list: Can you eat my crepe for me?
Can you eat my crepe for me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What? But you ordered that. Plus, you haven't
even touched it.
choice_data_list: I realized I'm not actually hungry. Please!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Stupid. You're too nice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says this as she takes my crepe, but I can tell
I've made her happy.
